---
title: "Notes: Orga"
format: html
---

| Time (min)  | Duration  | Topic                   |
|-------------|-----------|-------------------------|
| 00-20       | 20        | Orga                    |

::: callout-note
- Name tags?
- tools (spyder)?
- Format of the session (exercises, preparation/reading)
- Summary presentations of practitioner materials?
- Consultation hour?
- prior experience (e.g., python)?
- used spyder before? - of course, you can continue to use it.
- Ask students how they learn (PDF, ...) whether they use a knowledge management system (which one), ...

/home/gerit/ownCloud/data/teaching/teaching-hub/data/teaching-hub/archive/Diversity_guideline_first_session.pdf
-> special needs/religious holidays/...?

- Story (TI: Stanford slides, ... - both: hard skills + engagement with practice)
- I give my very best, aim to make this the best analytics course. 
- It is the first round - some things may not work immediately. I will ask for feedback very often.
:::
